source_label: Government of BC ArcGIS Map Viewer
what_page_provides: Generic ArcGIS Map Viewer shell without a specific map item in the naked URL.
likely_endpoint_families: Map Viewer asset bundles, including common and arcgis-core modules.
Generic ArcGIS portal item, sharing/rest, and service families implied by the runtime shell.
No concrete web map item was exposed directly from the naked shell URL during bounded recon.
likely_layer_families: Generic ArcGIS service families: FeatureServer, MapServer, ImageServer, VectorTileServer, SceneServer.
No concrete operational layer URL was exposed from the naked shell route in bounded recon.
auth_notes: Public shell route. Main rendered DOM exposes asset bundles only. Concrete map content likely requires a specific item or later user interaction.

endpoints.notes: Common Map Viewer asset bundle found in rendered DOM.
ArcGIS core asset bundle found in rendered DOM.
Generic ArcGIS content family implied by the shell; no specific item ID surfaced from the naked URL.
Generic ArcGIS service families are referenced in the common bundle, but no concrete layer URL surfaced from the naked shell.

widgets.label: Specific map import entry
widgets.notes: Only useful if a later pass supplies a specific ArcGIS item or web map.

widgets.label: Generic layer probe entry
widgets.notes: Naked mapviewer shell is too generic to support route-level widgets yet.
